message:
fix: create parent directory before appending to session log

appendToDisk would fail silently when the sessions/ directory didn't
exist, which always happened when StateDir was empty (the serfeval
case). The AfterAction error was swallowed as a warning, so fork
summaries were computed but never persisted to disk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
